biological_replicate: Huh-7 cells were maintained at 37 °C in 5% CO2
technical_replicate: samples were analyzed by nano-flow LC-MS/MS with technical duplicates
experimental_design: Doxorubicin (DOX) treatment was used as a control for cell viability.
factor_value: Doxorubicin (DOX) treatment was used as a control for cell viability.
number_of_fractions: Pooled peptide samples were fractionated using a Pierce™ High pH Reversed-Phase Peptide Fractionation Kit
